channel.title: Stewardship on Fellowship of Business Leaders
channel.description: Recent content in Stewardship on Fellowship of Business Leaders

item.title: CEOs Are Prioritizing Faith at Work for Better Decision-Making
item.description: A growing movement of business leaders is rediscovering what works: integrating their deeply-held beliefs into daily operations—not as a nice-to-have, but as the foundation for clarity, wisdom, and sustainable success.

item.title: Faith and Business: Integration Over Compartmentalization
item.description: Your faith and your business aren’t separate compartments. They’re meant to inform each other, strengthen each other, and operate as one integrated whole.
